name.description: Name of the Incident Severity Level

procore_default_name.description: Procore default name of the Incident Severity Level

active.description: Denotes whether the Incident Severity Level is active

email_trigger.description: Denotes whether an email should be sent

push_notification_trigger.description: Denotes whether a push notification should be sent

order.description: Ranking order of the Incident Severity Level

full_number.description: The Incident Number combined with the Record Number

incident_id.description: The id of the Incident to which the record belongs

recordable.description: Indicates whether the Incident Record is recordable

type.description: The type of incident record (environmental, injury, near_miss, property_damage)

active.description: Represents whether a Harm Source is available for use.

global.description: Represents whether a Harm Source has been provided by Procore.

hospitalized_overnight.description: Represents whether the injured person was hospitalized overnight

treated_in_er.description: Represents whether the injured person was treated in the ER

treatment_facility_address.description: The street address of the treatment facility

treatment_facility.description: The name of the treatment facility

treatment_provider.description: The name of the treatment provider

work_days_absent.description: The number of days absent from work

work_days_restricted.description: The number of days on restricted work

body_diagram_type.description: Body Type displayed in Body Diagram

active.description: Represents whether a Affliction Type is available for use.

global.description: Represents whether a Affliction Type has been provided by Procore.

affected_body_part.description: DEPRECATED. The body part affected by the affliction (138 possible values)

affected_body_parts.description: Array of body parts affected by the affliction

afflictions.description: DEPRECATED. Array of afflictions affecting the injured person. Currently this is limited to one.

body_parts.description: Body parts affected by the injury

pushed_at.description: Timestamp of when the push notification delivery
